haikus.haiku:
Sweet cocoa whispers,
Velvet rivers of delight,
Joy wrapped in each bite.
Happy #WorldChocolateDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Cheesy rivers flow,
Twirl of pasta on forks bright,
Warm hugs on the plate.
Happy #NationalMacaroniDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Colors dance on walls,
Joyful whispers fill the space,
Art sings through the years.
#HappyBirthdayMarcChagall from @ClamBakeSanta

Soft silver whispers,
Moonlight dances on still lakes,
Night wraps dreams in peace.
Happy #LastQuarterMoon from @ClamBakeSanta
